description: Balanced scoring across resilience transformation equity ecology governance livelihoods exposure burden lock-in and implementation burden.
Prioritizes structural transformation while retaining justice safeguards.
Prioritizes distributional justice and unequal vulnerability reduction.
Prioritizes ecosystem repair and social-ecological resilience.
Prioritizes participation legitimacy public accountability and shared authority.
Prioritizes workers households livelihoods and regional transition support.
Prioritizes reducing repeated exposure rather than normalizing adaptation burden.
Strongly penalizes pathways that shift cost risk labor displacement or ecological harm onto exposed groups.
Penalizes pathways whose implementation burden may exceed institutional capacity.
